content: Skip to login   Skip to main content   Skip to chat     Personal     Life Moments     Home and property guides   Home and property guides   Whether you’re buying, renovating, upgrading or paying off your home loan, read our home and property tips and tools.    Talk to a home loan expert today.   Book an appointment   Explore our home and property tips and tools   Buying your first home – the different stages   There’s a lot to consider, so here are some tips and tools to get you started.    Investing in property   Find out how investing in property can help you build wealth.    Renovating your home   A home renovation can help you increase equity or meet life’s changing needs.    Buying your next home   Thinking about buying a house or freeing up equity? We can help make it happen.    Paying off your home loan   Get excited about your financial future. Find out what's next when you pay off your home loan.    Refinancing your home loan   Why refinance your home loan?   Find out what refinancing is and why you should consider refinancing your home loan.    How to refinance your home loan   Find out all you need to know about refinancing your home loan.    The cost of refinancing your home loan   Find out everything you need to know about the cost of refinancing your home loan.    Buying your first home   How to get a home loan   See a full list of the information we'll request here.    Interest only home loans   Find out everything you need to know about an interest only home loan.    Understanding the settlement process when buying a home   Helping you understand and prepare for settlement day.    How much do you need for a house deposit   Tips to help you save a deposit for a home loan.    View all buying your first home articles   Investing in property   Interest only versus principal and interest repayments   We explain the difference between two types of home loans and how they affect your loan repayments.    Depreciation for an older investment property   How to claim depreciation on your investment property.    Understand cash flow before you invest in property   Understand investment property cash flow for long-term investments.    Using your home’s equity to invest   Michael Sloan explains how to calculate your equity and how to use it.    View all investing in property articles   Renovating your home   Understanding the basics of construction loans   How construction loans can help you save on interest – and control costs.    Renovation lending: How to finance your home makeover   Explore finance options for your home renovation.    View all renovating your home articles   Buying your next home   Bridging loans: should you buy or sell first?   Explore the pros and cons and decide if a bridging loan is right for you.    What to do after your property’s auctioned or passed in   Whether you sold on auction day or plan to re-list, we're here to help.    Preparing your home for sale   See how minor cosmetic touch ups can boost your home’s appeal.    Know what your property is worth   Some tips to help you get the best return come selling time.    View all buying your next home articles   Paying off your home loan   Seven tips to help pay your home loan faster   Changing how you make your home loan repayments could have a big impact.    What a financial plan covers and what you can expect   Find out what's involved in a financial plan using an adviser.    Your key priorities when winding down your mortgage   Follow our 'end-of-mortgage' checklist to prepare for three key priorities.    Manage your home loan repayments while on parental leave   Consider these options to help you manage your home loan repayments while on parental leave..    View all paying off your home loan articles   Related products   NAB iSaver   Enjoy flexibility with your savings while still earning interest. Receive the fixed bonus margin for the first four months on your first new account for balances up to $20m.    Home and Contents Insurance   Cover your home and contents with NAB insurance. Compare policies now.    Home loans   Home loans for every need with tools, calculators and guides to help you choose.    Contact us for home loan related queries   This is how you can get in touch.    Start a conversation with a banker    Log into either NAB Internet Banking or the NAB app.  Tap on the message icon.  Type ‘speak to a person’ in the conversation window.    Call us   Speak to a home loan expert about a new or existing home loan.    Monday to Friday, 8:00am to 7:00pm (AEST/AEDT) Saturday to Sunday, 9:00am to 6:00pm (AEST/AEDT)    13 78 79    Book an appointment   Make an appointment to see us at your nearest branch, ask a mobile banker to come to you or ask us to call you back.    Book an appointment   Important Information   Important information    This section contains Important Information relevant to the page you are viewing, but you can't see it because you have JavaScript disabled on your browser. Please enable JavaScript and come back so you can see the complete page. It's important that you read the Important Information in this section before acting on any information on this page.    Apologies but the Important Information section you are trying to view is not displaying properly at the moment. Please refresh the page or try again later.   Target Market Determinations for these products are available at nab.com.au/TMD.
description: Whether you’re buying your first home, upsizing or investing, our money tools and tips can help you get there faster.
